scenes.voice_text: Only TWO men in history ever stole a round from Khabib Nurmagomedov… and it still wasn’t enough.
29-0, 13-0 in the UFC, 40 rounds fought… judges gave the Eagle a 10-9 loss exactly twice.
First: Conor McGregor, UFC 229 round 3 – Conor outstruck him 34-22 and actually defended takedowns for once, so all three judges gave him the round.
Second: Justin Gaethje, UFC 254 round 1 – Gaethje came out swinging, landed clean leg kicks and punches, two judges scored it 10-9 before Khabib choked him out in round 2.
That’s it. Two rounds total across 13 UFC fights. Everyone else got completely blanked on the cards.
Khabib didn’t just go undefeated… he damn near went un-scored on. Drop a like if that’s the most dominant run ever.
